sentences.target: Die Landung war heute besonders sanft.

translations.de: Die Landung war heute besonders sanft.
translations.en: The landing was especially smooth today.
translations.es: El aterrizaje fue especialmente suave hoy.
translations.fr: L’atterrissage a été particulièrement doux aujourd’hui.
translations.it: L’atterraggio oggi è stato particolarmente morbido.
translations.pt: O pouso foi especialmente suave hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay máy bay hạ cánh rất êm.
translations.ar: كان الهبوط سلسًا اليوم بشكل خاص.
translations.nl: De landing was vandaag extra soepel.
translations.hu: A mai leszállás különösen sima volt.
translations.hi: आज विमान का उतरना खास तौर पर मुलायम रहा.
translations.el: Η προσγείωση σήμερα ήταν ιδιαίτερα ομαλή.
translations.nb: Landingen var spesielt myk i dag.
translations.sv: Landningen var extra mjuk i dag.
translations.ro: Aterizarea a fost deosebit de lină astăzi.
translations.da: Landingen var særligt blød i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は着陸が特にスムーズでした。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine; determiner for the subject noun 'Landung'.
Common noun (feminine); head of the subject noun phrase.
Finite auxiliary (copula), 3rd person singular preterite; links subject to predicate complement.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicate adjective 'sanft'.
Predicative adjective serving as subject complement with the copula.

sentences.target: Ich filme die Landung mit meinem Handy.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfɪlmə diː ˈlandʊŋ mɪt ˈmaɪnəm ˈhɛndi/

translations.de: Ich filme die Landung mit meinem Handy.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfɪlmə diː ˈlandʊŋ mɪt ˈmaɪnəm ˈhɛndi/
translations.en: I’m filming the landing with my phone.
translations.es: Estoy grabando el aterrizaje con el móvil.
translations.fr: Je filme l’atterrissage avec mon téléphone.
translations.it: Sto filmando l’atterraggio con il telefono.
translations.pt: Estou filmando o pouso com o meu celular.
translations.he: אני מצלם את הנחיתה בטלפון שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi đang quay cảnh hạ cánh bằng điện thoại.
translations.nl: Ik film de landing met mijn telefoon.
translations.hu: A leszállást a telefonommal veszem fel.
translations.hi: मैं अपने फ़ोन से उतरने का क्षण फिल्मा रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βιντεοσκοπώ την προσγείωση με το κινητό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg filmer landingen med telefonen min.
translations.id: Saya merekam pendaratan dengan ponsel saya.
translations.da: Jeg filmer landingen med min telefon.
translations.ja: 着陸をスマホで撮影しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present.
Definite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner of the direct object 'Landung'.
Common noun (feminine); direct object of 'filme'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a prepositional phrase.
Possessive determiner, dative singular neuter; agrees with 'Handy'.
Common noun (neuter); object of the preposition 'mit'.

sentences.target: Wir klatschen nach der Landung leise.

translations.de: Wir klatschen nach der Landung leise.
translations.en: We clap softly after the landing.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在降落后轻轻鼓掌。
translations.pt: Batemos palmas de leve depois do pouso.
translations.he: אנחנו מוחאים כפיים בשקט אחרי הנחיתה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi vỗ tay khẽ sau khi hạ cánh.
translations.nl: We klappen zachtjes na de landing.
translations.hi: उतरने के बाद हम धीरे से ताली बजाते हैं.
translations.id: Kami bertepuk tangan pelan setelah pendaratan.
translations.ja: 着陸後に静かに拍手します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present, 1st person plural.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative singular feminine; determiner of 'Landung' after 'nach'.
Common noun (feminine); object of the preposition 'nach'.
Adverb of manner modifying 'klatschen'.

sentences.target: Die Landung verspätet sich um zwanzig Minuten.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈlandʊŋ fɛʁˈʃpɛːtət zɪç ʊm ˈtsvant͡sɪç miˈnuːtən/

translations.de: Die Landung verspätet sich um zwanzig Minuten.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈlandʊŋ fɛʁˈʃpɛːtət zɪç ʊm ˈtsvant͡sɪç miˈnuːtən/
translations.en: The landing is delayed by twenty minutes.
translations.es: El aterrizaje se retrasa veinte minutos.
translations.fr: L’atterrissage est retardé de vingt minutes.
translations.it: L’atterraggio è in ritardo di venti minuti.
translations.pt: O pouso está atrasado em vinte minutos.
translations.vi: Việc hạ cánh bị trễ hai mươi phút.
translations.nl: De landing is twintig minuten vertraagd.
translations.hi: उतरने में बीस मिनट की देरी है.
translations.pl: Lądowanie opóźnia się o dwadzieścia minut.
translations.el: Η προσγείωση καθυστερεί κατά είκοσι λεπτά.
translations.nb: Landingen er forsinket med tjue minutter.
translations.sv: Landningen är försenad med tjugo minuter.
translations.ro: Aterizarea este întârziată cu douăzeci de minute.
translations.cs: Přistání se zpožďuje o dvacet minut.
translations.da: Landingen er forsinket med tyve minutter.
translations.ja: 着陸は20分遅れています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine; determiner of the subject 'Landung'.
Common noun (feminine); head of the subject.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; used reflexively with 'sich'.
Reflexive pronoun, 3rd person; object of 'verspätet' in the reflexive construction.
Preposition indicating amount/degree; introduces the measure phrase.
Cardinal numeral; quantifies 'Minuten'.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'um'.
